query:
SELECT 
  @@global.time_zone as global_tz,
  @@session.time_zone as session_tz,
  NOW() as now_mysql,
  CURDATE() as curdate_mysql,
  CURTIME() as curtime_mysql,
  UTC_TIMESTAMP() as utc_timestamp;
